allow: PowerShell(gh issue view 11337 --repo surveyjs/survey-library --json title,body,comments | ConvertFrom-Json | ForEach-Object { $_.title; "`n---BODY---`n"; $_.body; "`n---COMMENTS---`n"; $_.comments | ForEach-Object { $_.author.login + ": " + $_.body } })

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const p='packages/survey-react-ui/node_modules/survey-core';try{const s=fs.lstatSync\(p\);console.log\('react-ui/node_modules/survey-core symlink?',s.isSymbolicLink\(\)\);if\(s.isSymbolicLink\(\)\)console.log\('->',fs.readlinkSync\(p\)\);}catch\(e\){console.log\('not in react-ui node_modules:',e.code\)}; const p2='node_modules/survey-core';try{const s=fs.lstatSync\(p2\);console.log\('root node_modules/survey-core symlink?',s.isSymbolicLink\(\)\);if\(s.isSymbolicLink\(\)\)console.log\('->',fs.readlinkSync\(p2\)\);}catch\(e\){console.log\('root err',e.code\)}")
